caption: A man with short, dark hair and a light beard is recorded in a studio setting against a background of dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a dark jacket over a grey shirt. A professional silver microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. As the sequence progresses, the man's expression shifts from a neutral, attentive look while gazing slightly to the side to a wide, joyful smile. By the final moments, he is laughing, with his eyes crinkling and his mouth open, while continuing to face towards the right of the frame. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a close-up shot of the man and the recording equipment throughout the clip.
